message:
test(fcp-core): pin PrerequisiteStatus serde + DescriptorStatus mapping (flywheel_connectors-nhms0)

Bead asks for ConnectorActivationStage Display + serde tag. fcp-core
has no type literally named ConnectorActivationStage; the
activation-stage-shaped surface covers ConnectorLifecycleState
(already pinned), DescriptorStatus (already pinned by
live_status_serde_tag_matrix.rs), ProvisioningStatus (already
pinned by connector_plan_step_ordering.rs), and PrerequisiteStatus
(connector_descriptors.rs:355, 7 variants describing per-prerequisite
activation stages: Satisfied/Missing/Drifted/Unverifiable/
PolicyBlocked/NotYetMeasured/Unavailable). PrerequisiteStatus is the
closest "activation stage" analogue and was the unpinned classifier
in this surface — it has a documented `From<PrerequisiteStatus>` →
`DescriptorStatus` projection at line 372.

Coverage:
- PrerequisiteStatus per-variant JSON tag (snake_case: satisfied/
  missing/drifted/unverifiable/policy_blocked/not_yet_measured/
  unavailable) with onboarding-dashboard regression sentinel
- JSON + CBOR round-trip per variant; CBOR encodes as Text
- Multi-word variants use underscore (policy_blocked, not
  policyblocked/policyBlocked; not_yet_measured, not
  notYetMeasured/not-yet-measured)
- PascalCase + camelCase + kebab-case + ready (wrong vocabulary)
  + empty rejected
- 7-variant count + pairwise distinctness
- From<PrerequisiteStatus> → DescriptorStatus truth table for all
  7 variants — 6 are identity-named (Missing/Drifted/Unverifiable/
  PolicyBlocked/NotYetMeasured/Unavailable preserve their tokens),
  Satisfied → Ready is the only rename and is pinned loud since
  the token changes when crossing the projection boundary
- Identity-named projections preserve JSON tokens byte-for-byte
- Token format invariants: every token is snake_case lowercase
  ASCII non-empty with no leading/trailing/double underscore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
